title: Geibuchan Doodles in a Napkin While Looking For Frames With Koopa for the King's Epic Adventure
description: Kinda just had to do this. This is a niiice display of simplicity made from scraps left over from this scene I'm doing for the King's Epic Adventure. I had fun doing this. By the way, the king's epic adventure stands over 22 minutes with only two scenes left to take care of. this little thing here was a tiiiiiiiiny product of one of them,
